name: Anne
text: Visited Ceramiche Da Mario last summer during our honeymoon on the Amalfi Coast and fell in love with Vietri ceramics! The girls were incredibly helpful and kind and arranged shipment of our purchases to the USA. Everything arrived in perfect condition despite the long trip. Highly recommend!

name: Timothy
text: We discovered this wonderful shop right next to the food shop in Praiano. Amazing souvenirs and beautiful ceramics. We bought tiny ceramic cups and a set of plates — they even ship worldwide! Teresa was so kind and helped us choose the perfect gifts.

name: Giulia
text: Ho trovato il negozio attraverso i social media e ho ordinato un set di piatti decorati. La consegna è stata velocissima e i piatti sono ancora più belli dal vivo di quanto mi aspettassi. Un pezzo autentico della Costa d'Amalfi!

name: Karl
text: Ciao Teresa, Anna and Mariella! Three sisters running this beautiful shop in Praiano with so much passion and love. Every piece tells a story. We come back every year to add to our collection. The quality is outstanding and the prices are very fair.

name: Sophie
text: Un vrai coup de cœur! Nous avons trouvé cette boutique en nous promenant dans Praiano. Les céramiques sont magnifiques, faites à la main avec des couleurs incroyables. Les filles sont adorables et nous ont aidé à emballer tout avec soin. Un souvenir inoubliable de la Côte Amalfitaine!
